message:
✨ Use local agent for cluster data and add drill-down to ClusterHealth (#36)

* ✨ Use local agent for cluster data and add drill-down to ClusterHealth

- useClusters hook now tries local agent (127.0.0.1:8585) first
- Falls back to backend API if agent unavailable
- ClusterHealth card rows now clickable with drill-down to cluster details

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Add in-cluster config support and increase agent timeout

- Add in-cluster config support to k8s client for deployed console
- When kubeconfig file doesn't exist, fallback to in-cluster config
- Increase kkc-agent timeout from 3s to 5s for stability
- Add "in-cluster" as a virtual cluster when running in-cluster

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Add failure threshold for more stable agent connection

- Require 2 consecutive failures before marking as disconnected
- Prevents brief network hiccups from causing disconnect flicker
- Maintains connected status during transient failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix WebSocket connection on deployed versions

- Skip WebSocket connection on non-localhost deployments
- WebSocket to localhost:8080 only works in dev mode
- Deployed versions (Netlify) should just poll without WebSocket

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,10 @@
 import { Server, CheckCircle, AlertTriangle, XCircle, RefreshCw } from 'lucide-react'
 import { useClusters } from '../../hooks/useMCP'
+import { useDrillDownActions } from '../../hooks/useDrillDown'
 
 export function ClusterHealth() {
   const { clusters, isLoading, error, refetch } = useClusters()
+  const { drillToCluster } = useDrillDownActions()
 
   const healthyClusters = clusters.filter((c) => c.healthy).length
   const unhealthyClusters = clusters.filter((c) => !c.healthy).length
@@ -60,6 +62,12 @@ export function ClusterHealth() {
           <div
             key={cluster.name}
             className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg bg-secondary/30 hover:bg-secondary/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+            onClick={() => drillToCluster(cluster.name, {
+              healthy: cluster.healthy,
+              nodeCount: cluster.nodeCount,
+              podCount: cluster.podCount,
+              server: cluster.server,
+            })}
           >
             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
               <div
